MasterPortDestroyer is armed
UltraGrid 1.10.3 (tags/v1.10.3 rev 12e2705 built Feb 20 2026 15:07:39)

[PortAudio] Using PortAudio V19.7.0-devel, revision 147dd722548358763a8b649b3e4b41dfffbcfbb6
PortAudio capture usage:
	-s portaudio:[full]help
	-s portaudio[:<index>[:latency=<l>]]
or
	-s portaudio[:device=<dev>][:latency=<l>]

options:
	 <l> 	suggested latency in sec (experimental, use in case of problems)
	<dev>	device name (or a part of it); device index is also accepted here


Available PortAudio capture devices (max channels; API):
	portaudio - use default Portaudio device (marked with star)
	portaudio:0 - NDI Audio (2; Core Audio)
(*) 	portaudio:4 - MacBook Pro Microphone (1; Core Audio)
	portaudio:5 - MacBook Pro Speakers (0; Core Audio)
	portaudio:7 - NDI Audio (0; Core Audio)

Examples:
	vendor/ultragrid/active/uv-qt.app/Contents/MacOS/uv-real -s portaudio:d="MacBook Pro"
Exit
MasterPortDestroyer triggered
